# GitHub Copilot — repository custom instructions

The canonical agent-instruction surface for this repository is
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md). This file is a deliberate stub so the two
cannot fork; the `lint-instructions` CI job verifies the marker above
matches `AGENTS.md` and the per-task playbooks under
[`docs/playbooks/`](../docs/playbooks/) follow the required structure.
